evals.prompt: Write tests for the material-service. It handles CRUD operations for materials (Materialien) with fields like name, einheit (unit), preis (price), kategorie, mindestbestand (minimum stock), and bestand (current stock). It stores data in localStorage under 'freyai_materials' and supports search, low-stock alerts, and stock updates.
evals.expected_output: A test file tests/material-service.test.js with localStorage mock, inlined class, describe blocks for CRUD, search, stock alerts (bestand < mindestbestand), stock update, persistence, and edge cases (empty name, negative price).

assertions.name: file-location
assertions.description: Test file is created at tests/material-service.test.js

assertions.name: vitest-imports
assertions.description: Imports describe, it, expect, beforeEach, vi from vitest

assertions.name: localstorage-mock
assertions.description: Uses the established localStorage mock pattern with getItem/setItem/removeItem/clear

assertions.name: crud-coverage
assertions.description: Has tests for add, update, delete, and get operations

assertions.name: low-stock-alert
assertions.description: Tests that low-stock detection works when bestand < mindestbestand

assertions.name: german-field-names
assertions.description: Uses German field names (einheit, preis, kategorie, mindestbestand, bestand) matching source

assertions.name: persistence-test
assertions.description: Verifies data survives a service re-instantiation via localStorage

evals.prompt: Write tests for auth-service covering login, logout, registration, session management, password reset, and auth state change listeners. The service wraps Supabase Auth and stores user/session state internally.
evals.expected_output: A test file tests/auth-service.test.js with Supabase client mock, tests for register (with metadata), login (success + failure), logout (clears state), session retrieval, password reset/update, listener subscribe/unsubscribe, and error handling when Supabase is not configured.

assertions.name: supabase-mock
assertions.description: Mocks supabaseConfig.get() returning a client with auth methods (signUp, signInWithPassword, signOut, getSession, etc.)

assertions.name: register-with-metadata
assertions.description: Tests registration passes company_name, full_name, phone, plan to Supabase signUp options

assertions.name: login-error-handling
assertions.description: Tests that login throws on invalid credentials (error returned from Supabase)

assertions.name: logout-clears-state
assertions.description: Tests that logout sets user and session to null

assertions.name: listener-pattern
assertions.description: Tests onAuthChange subscribe returns unsubscribe function, and _notify calls all listeners

assertions.name: not-configured-error
assertions.description: Tests that operations throw 'Supabase nicht konfiguriert' when client is null

evals.prompt: Write tests for the offline-sync behavior in db-service. The service uses a dual-layer pattern: try Supabase first, fall back to IndexedDB on error/offline, queue offline changes in sync_queue, and sync when connection is restored. Test the fallback logic, queue mechanics, and sync cycle.
evals.expected_output: A test file tests/db-service.test.js with mocks for both Supabase client and IndexedDB, tests for: successful Supabase read, fallback to IndexedDB on network error, queuing writes when offline, processing sync queue on reconnect, conflict handling, and clearing the queue after successful sync.

assertions.name: dual-layer-fallback
assertions.description: Tests that when Supabase fails, data is read from IndexedDB cache

assertions.name: offline-queue-write
assertions.description: Tests that writes during offline are added to sync_queue with table name and operation type

assertions.name: sync-on-reconnect
assertions.description: Tests that queued items are sent to Supabase when connection restores

assertions.name: queue-cleared-after-sync
assertions.description: Tests that sync_queue is cleared after all items sync successfully

assertions.name: table-name-mapping
assertions.description: Tests or uses the English-to-German table mapping (customers->kunden, invoices->rechnungen)

assertions.name: indexeddb-mock
assertions.description: Uses a mock for IndexedDB operations (not real IndexedDB)
